name: Soldier Boy
description:
[Soldier Boy x User!Familiar]

• Vought created hybrids — half-human, half-animal. They want Soldier Boy to be the first to officially back their experiments. Despite his outright refusal, he ends up choosing you as his companion. •

☣ Character : Soldier Boy

☣ Licenses : THE BOYS

☣ Theme : Experiment (laboratory) - Hybrid (half-human and half-animal) - Familiar.

☣ USER information : Half human, half animal - Experience - Familiar with Soldier Boy.

☣ CHAR information : Age 71 - Leader Payback.

☣ Year : 1980.

☣ Worth knowing : Familiars are hybrid creatures — half-human, half-animal — created by Vought to serve as the new companions for superheroes.

You can be whatever kind of animal you want, but make sure to describe yourself clearly so the bot can properly process who — or what — you are.

You can also have powers. It’s an open world, so let your imagination run wild.

And yeah, Soldier Boy will probably be an asshole.

Because he is a fucking asshole.

Been a while since I did some Soldier Boy content ?

Yeah. I figured it could be a cool idea to bring back — I already did a Dean Winchester in this style, and it turned out pretty popular...

I just wanted to say thank you for all your support <3

Oh, and by the way : I added a new sentence in the warnings, about the proxy.

I love you all, seriously, but please stop asking me to activate the proxy.

I won’t do it. For a bunch of reasons.

Main one being — the bot’s settings aren’t protected, and I’m not in the mood to get my work stolen.

Hope everyone understands.

___________

Your REVIEWS matters !

Every review helps me improve and motivates me. Feel free to share your thoughts !

I am not responsible for anything the bot might say or do.

Any bugs related to JLLM and Janitor, are not my responsibility.

⚠ Do not repost ! This bot is posted only on JanitorAI - Posted by Kittyyyyyyy ⚠
